The '''''Dagobah Revised Unlimited''''' set is the third full unlimited expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]], a card game based on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe. It consists of 180 cards (90 Dark Side and 90 Light Side cards) and was introduced in [[December]] of [[1999]]. This set consists of 80 rare, 50 uncommon, and 50 common cards. This set introduced many of the classic characters from [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] that were involved with the events occurring on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. This set also introduced [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] to game play. Some of the notable cards include [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], Son of Skywalker, [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88]], [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], and [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]].

Because this is an expansion set, it bears an expansion-set symbol, which is located near the top right corner of the card to the right of the lore and below the destiny number. The symbol for this set is [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] green eye.

==Release==
This set was sold in 9-card expansion packs and 30-pack expansion boxes. Each pack included one rare card, three uncommon cards, and five common cards. Starter decks were never produced for this set. This set is almost identical to [[Dagobah Limited]] except for some minor game text revisions and the fact that the borders in this set are white instead of black.
